description: A screenshot of a live U.S. Senate floor proceeding (C-SPAN-style broadcast), showing the ornate Senate chamber with blue carpet, marble walls, the presiding officer's rostrum with an American flag, and senators and staff at desks. The only on-image text is the official broadcast lower-third graphic: at left the round blue 'UNITED STATES SENATE' seal, with a blue banner reading 'Yea 54 Nay 45' above white caption text 'Nomination of Kevin Warsh, of Florida, to be Chairman of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.' This is a captured broadcast frame rather than an agency-designed meme/poster; the caption bar is the C-SPAN/Senate feed's own chyron, not custom graphic design. Marked is_designed=false. The tweet text announces 'CONFIRMED: Kevin Warsh as the 17th Chairman of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System.'
notable_text: Yea 54 Nay 45 | Nomination of Kevin Warsh, of Florida, to be Chairman of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
